title: Owls & Deliveries
description: A mod for Minecraft that adds Owls that can deliver Bundles.
body:
Owls & Deliveries

A mod that introduces a Owl-based delivery system to Minecraft!

## Features - Adds Owls to Minecraft! - They can be found in forests, taigas or snowy taigas, only at Night. - There a few variants, some of which are found only in certain biomes. Most varaints also have different Eye Colors. There's also a rare Shiny Owl variant that has 1/200 chance of replacing any naturally spawned owl. - You can tame Owls by feeding them Raw Rabbit. Breed them with Rabbit Foot. - Rename a bundle with the name of an online player, right-click an Owl with the bundle, and it will deliver the bundle to that player. - Renaming an Owl to "Folly", "Lux" or "Nycto", it'll get a special variant. After an Owl gets a special variant you can rename it to whatever you want. # ## Credits - [THIS MOD IS HEAVILY INSPIRED BY MASON'S DECOR'S RAVENS.](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mason-decor) #
